underlying_goal: Add an alarm widget to an existing weather widget app, with shared font settings, proper update logic, and various refinements including package rename and bug fixes
friction_detail: Alarm widget crashed on placement due to double goAsync() call, and initially failed to detect existing alarms; Claude also started editing before user asked to rename string keys first.
brief_summary: User wanted a new alarm widget added to their weather app with shared settings, then requested package rename and string cleanup; implementation was mostly successful but required fixing a crash and an initial-placement bug.
